title: Refund policy
body: Refund requests are accepted within 30 days of purchase. Agents should collect the order number, reason for the refund, and preferred contact method before creating a billing ticket.

title: Delivery and missed orders
body: For delayed or missing deliveries, collect the order number, delivery postcode, courier name if known, and whether the customer paid for express delivery. Express delivery failures should be high priority.

title: Appointment changes
body: Customers can reschedule appointments up to 24 hours before the booked time. Agents should confirm the original date, desired date, and customer phone number.

title: Human escalation
body: Escalate to a human when the customer asks for one, is angry, mentions legal action, has a payment problem, requests cancellation, or when the AI confidence is low.
